title: Gemma 4 verification doc-substrate (license + benchmarks; runtime serving phase-gated to Phase 4)
test_commands: python -c "doc = open('docs/gemma_4_verification.md').read(); assert 'Apache 2.0' in doc, 'license missing'; assert 'Gemma Use Policy' in doc or 'Gemma Prohibited Use Policy' in doc or 'Gemma Terms of Use' in doc, 'use-policy missing'; assert '84.3%' in doc and '89.2%' in doc and '85.2%' in doc, 'Google-official benchmark values missing or incorrect'; assert 'Llama 4 Scout' in doc, 'fallback model missing'; assert 'Phase-4-deferred' in doc and 'blockers.md' in doc, 'phase-4 deferral citation missing'; print('content-and-values-OK')"

artifacts.rationale: vLLM/SGLang serving recipe (§3.1 + §3.2 of doc) requires bare-metal H100/H200 cluster to execute. Phase-4-deferred per blockers.md §3 API-first sequencing user-signed canonical reconciliation 2026-05-02. Doc-substrate (recipe documented, license verified, benchmarks excerpted, fallback named) IS complete in Phase 0; runtime exercise happens at Phase 4 entry.

open_bugs.summary: vLLM/SGLang serving-recipe runtime verification is NOT performed in Phase 0. Only the doc-substrate (license + benchmark excerpts + recipe doc + fallback) is shipped this phase. Runtime exercise is phase-gated to Phase 4 entry per blockers.md §3 API-first sequencing.
criteria_deferred: Phase 4: execute vllm serve google/gemma-4-31B-it on FP16 build cluster (recipe in doc §3.1)
Phase 4: execute vllm serve nvidia/Gemma-4-31B-IT-NVFP4 on OVH BHS H200 (recipe in doc §3.2)
Phase 4: throughput / latency-to-first-token benchmark (per doc §4 baseline expectations)
open_bugs.resolution_path: Phase 4 entry (~2026-08-10): cluster live → execute recipes → populate runtime metrics → fresh task_0_8 verdict supersedes this prep.

evidence_links.evidence: Sources section lists `https://ai.google.dev/gemma/docs/core/model_card_4` (official Google model card) and `https://huggingface.co/google/gemma-4-31B` (HuggingFace mirror). §2 (lines 50-62) tabulates verified properties from the model card.

evidence_links.green_criterion: (b) Apache 2.0 license + Gemma Use Policy noted
evidence_links.evidence: §1 Material correction: explicitly states 'Apache 2.0 license text + 3 layered Google policies' (Gemma Prohibited Use Policy / Gemma Intended Use Statement / Gemma Terms of Use). 8 prohibited-use categories enumerated. Government / sovereign deployment explicitly NOT prohibited (line 38). Severity for Carney: LOW.

evidence_links.green_criterion: (c) Benchmark table excerpt (GPQA Diamond / AIME 2026 from Google)
evidence_links.evidence: §4.1 Benchmark table excerpts the Google official Gemma 4 model card values verbatim for the 31B Dense instruction-tuned variant: GPQA Diamond 84.3%, AIME 2026 no tools 89.2%, MMLU Pro 85.2%, LiveCodeBench v6 80.0%, BigBench Extra Hard 74.4%, Codeforces ELO 2150, Tau2 76.9%, HLE no tools 19.5%, HLE with search 26.5%. Source URL https://ai.google.dev/gemma/docs/core/model_card_4 listed in Sources section. Doc explicitly notes (a) AIME label is Google's verbatim 'AIME 2026 no tools' wording, and (b) Google does NOT report HumanEval — coding metric is LiveCodeBench v6 + Codeforces ELO instead.

§4.2 'Named fallback: Llama 4 Scout 109B (MoE)' — 109B parameters MoE, ~17B active, Llama 4 Community License, Meta lineage (preserves two-family invariant), vLLM+SGLang both support. Triggering requires user-signed canonical reconciliation per Plan v13 §F (no SILENT fallback).

evidence_links.green_criterion: (e) Explicit note: vLLM/SGLang serving recipe verification deferred to Phase 4 cluster entry per blockers.md §3
evidence_links.evidence: §4.3 'vLLM/SGLang serving-recipe verification — Phase-4-deferred (explicit)'. Cites blockers.md §3 user-signed canonical reconciliation 2026-05-02. Explicitly states 'NOT a silent fallback — it is the canonical API-first sequencing per blockers.md §3'.

evidence_links.green_criterion: outputs/audits/manifests/0.8.json — Phase-0-PARTIAL-honest manifest documenting doc-substrate complete + runtime deferred
evidence_links.evidence: This file. Phase-0-PARTIAL-honest framing in `substrate_honesty_attestation`. Runtime deferral documented in `open_bugs[0]` with explicit resolution_path.

codex_findings_addressed: P1 iter-1: Fabricated benchmark numbers replaced with Google-official values (GPQA Diamond 84.3%, AIME 2026 no tools 89.2%, MMLU Pro 85.2%, LiveCodeBench v6 80.0%, BigBench Extra Hard 74.4%, Codeforces ELO 2150, Tau2 76.9%, HLE 19.5%/26.5%) — verified via WebFetch of https://ai.google.dev/gemma/docs/core/model_card_4. Doc §4.1 now quotes exact Google card values + adds explicit notes that AIME label is Google's verbatim wording and Google does NOT report HumanEval (coding metric is LiveCodeBench + Codeforces ELO).
P1 iter-1: Manifest evidence corrected to match the corrected doc — line_range now 115-133 for §4.1, lists actual Google values.
P1 iter-1: Stale line_ranges fixed — §4.1 now 115-133, §4.2 now 135-147, §4.3 now 149-155 (post-edit).

P3 iter-1: Smoke test strengthened — replaced string-presence check with value-level check (asserts '84.3%' and '89.2%' and '85.2%' literally appear in doc, plus license + fallback + phase-4-deferral citations).
substrate_honesty_attestation: Phase-0-PARTIAL-honest framing per Plan v13 §F (no SILENT fallback). This manifest closes the orchestrator-completable portion of task 0.8 — the verification doc-substrate. Runtime serving-recipe verification (vllm serve commands in doc §3.1 + §3.2) is explicitly Phase-4-deferred per blockers.md §3 API-first sequencing user-signed canonical reconciliation 2026-05-02. NOT a silent fallback. Documented in open_bugs[0] with explicit resolution_path.
